title: Monday+ whatsup notifications - is that possible?
excerpt:
As the title say Monday+ whatsup notifications - is that possible?. I want to integrate whatsup to monday so that my students receive notifications/reminders daily on whatsup. 
How can i do that?

posts.author: mihai.oprisenescu (Mihai Oprisenescu)
posts.cookedHtml:
As the title say Monday+ whatsup notifications - is that possible?. I want to integrate whatsup to monday so that my students receive notifications/reminders daily on whatsup.
How can i do that?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @mihai.oprisenescu !

There is an App for integrating monday and whatsup.

You can find more details here : Integrate Whatsapp to Monday. Start tracking Whatsapp sales now! - TimelinesAI

Hope this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: mihai.oprisenescu (Mihai Oprisenescu)
posts.cookedHtml: thanks but is a 3th partyy app. I was asking for a solution in Monday. I know that I can use Zapier and many other options outside monday. But is something in monday that can work?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml: I am afraid not. You would need to use either Make/Zappier, or check out the aforementioned app.
